---
title: "2025 EERI LFE Travel Study — Mexico: Lessons on Post-Earthquake Engineering Interventions on Cultural and Historic Buildings"
date: 2025-09-19
categories: [symposium, eeri]
venue: "40th Mexico City Earthquake Anniversary Symposium, Mexico City, Mexico"
description: "Presentation on post-earthquake engineering interventions on cultural and historic buildings in Mexico City."
---

## Event

**40th Mexico City Earthquake Anniversary Symposium**  
Mexico City, Mexico · September 19, 2025

## Related links

- [EERI LFE Travel Study recap](https://www.eeri.org/about-eeri/news/27694-lfe-travel-study-explores-mexico-s-40-year-journey-toward-earthquake-resilience)
- [About](/about.qmd)
